get.description: Whether planning is enabled or the optimizer is in read-only mode (frontend data model §Optimizer plans, key ["optimizer-enabled"]). Polled. Open to anyone — reads need no token (anonymous-viewer posture, platform security §4).

post.description: Enable or disable the optimizer at runtime (operator only, slice 3). Disabling drops it into read-only mode immediately — no scheduled cycles, no setpoint writes, reads still served. In-memory override; resets to the configured default on restart.

200.description: The enable state after the change.
